name: Harry Reid
subject: a proven fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
There is _nothing_ more important for Democrats this year than taking back the Senate majority - and the only way we can do that is by winning here in Nevada.
**But team, we received news that Jacky is basically tied with Dean Heller. If Jacky wins, Nevada wins.**
A Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC is promising to spend at least $11.2 million to help Republicans keep this seat - and the Senate majority. The future of our country is riding on you.
If Jacky loses this fall, Senate Republicans will have free rein to defund Planned Parenthood, attack Americans' health care and send more anti-everything ultraconservatives to the Supreme Court.
**We can't let this happen. That's why I told Jacky I'd help her raise the $10,000 she needs by midnight to keep Nevada blue and take back the United States Senate for Democrats.**
**[But with just hours to go, we're still falling short, so I need to ask: Please, can you give $5 by midnight for a better Nevada?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1e2/4fbb2af3/7b558ac1/5e8b7f46/2471539421/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg4NS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk885-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Jacky Rosen combines compassion with tenacity. She's proven that as a member of the United States Congress, working late nights and long weeks to make sure our voices are heard in Washington.
She's a proven fighter. And she's the leader that Nevada needs.
But team, the only way she'll be able to stay competitive is if grassroots donors like you are committed to this fight. **[So I'm counting on you to give $5 before our midnight deadline to help flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate:](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1e2/4fbb2af3/7b558ac1/5e8b7f46/2471539421/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg4NS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk885-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[Click to donate $5.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1e2/4fbb2af3/7b558ac1/5e8b7f47/2471539421/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg4NS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVUZ5Y21GNVFTQjlmUT09IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk885-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")**

Harry

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1e2/4fbb2af3/7b558ac1/5e8b7f42/2471539421/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1e2/4fbb2af3/7b558ac1/5e8b7f43/2471539421/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1e2/4fbb2af3/7b558ac1/5e8b7f40/2471539421/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.

name: Chris McDaniel
subject: Stop the dirty money
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel
body:
When I saw the news that Cindy Hyde-Smith’s Super PAC took a massive, $250,000 donation from Sean Parker -- one of Hillary Clinton’s biggest supporters and donors -- I almost couldn’t believe it. Peter, When I saw the news that Cindy Hyde-Smith’s Super PAC took a massive, $250,000 donation from Sean Parker -- one of Hillary Clinton’s biggest supporters and donors -- I almost couldn’t believe it. Almost. After all, Cindy Hyde-Smith is a lifelong Democrat who voted for Hillary Clinton. Now the Democrats are trying to buy their way into a Republican primary to prop up one of their own. Help fight back against the dirty Democratic money bankrolling Cindy Hyde-Smith! Chip in $10, $25, $50, $100, or anything you can give right now. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180723_Parker&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180723_Parker] Sean Parker is no friend of Mississippi -- he stands for everything that we oppose. He’s a California billionaire who has funded campaigns aimed at taking away 2nd Amendment rights, donated seven-figures to pro-amnesty groups, and even helped raise $1 million for Hillary Clinton’s campaign against Donald Trump. He doesn’t care about Mississippi. He only cares about defeating true conservatives. No true conservative would accept money from a Hillary Clinton supporter, but that’s how the establishment operates: they turn their backs on you once they are elected. This is real money that we have to compete against. Democrat donors have deep pockets and are desperate to beat us. We can beat them, but only with your help. Stop the left from buying their way into Republican primaries. Chip in today and support a real conservative who will always stand with you, not California billionaires. [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180723_Parker&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180723_Parker] Chip in $10 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180723_Parker&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180723_Parker] Chip in $25 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180723_Parker&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180723_Parker] Chip in $50 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180723_Parker&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180723_Parker] Chip in $100 [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180723_Parker&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180723_Parker] With our thin majority in the Senate, we need true conservatives in Washington who will stand with President Trump. Mississippi deserves better than Cindy Hyde-Smith. Thank you, Chris P.S - Cindy Hyde-Smith is being funded by one of Hillary Clinton’s biggest donors -- a California billionaire who doesn’t care about Mississippi at all and only wants to defeat conservatives. Chip in right now and help us fight back against this dirty money trying to buy Mississippi’s vote! [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180723_Parker&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180723_Parker] DONATE [https://mcdaniel2018.com/contribute/?src=hf_mcdaniel_180723_Parker&utm_source=hf&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=180723_Parker] [https://twitter.com/CMForUSSenate]

PAID FOR BY Friends of Chris McDaniel

Click here to unsubscribe. https://mcdanielforsenate.cmail20.com/t/d-u-biukdtt-ydllhlurty-z/

subject: Double
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Did you see our last email? |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a812140c6801e628ccf140990f9a77832b77a9b36bb5d0c234756eea3a07675c3922d8c0532ad02a9025d2d1f9af975d15d7c1013090b528)
---

Friend,

My father-in-law has tuned out the mainstream media.

He cares more about knowing he has support from patriots like you.

That's why he's holding another massive rally -- and is inviting a top patriot to enter to win to be his behind-the-scenes VIP special guest and get your picture taken together.

_**And because you 've been such a strong supporter, your entry will count TWICE. **_

---
| **[Make a contribution of just $1 by 11:59 TONIGHT to automatically enter your name TWICE.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b7c84dbd5ffa84caee83a31aecc4afdba881f512c8883e442ae8fabd63ffd2068cfbd1827ddc8ed7631028349541a63684a286b7b46644c4)**

If you win we will cover your flight, your lodging, and getting you to the rally.

All you have to do is decide who you want to bring to share this special moment with.

**[Make a contribution of just $1 by 11:59 TONIGHT to automatically enter your name TWICE.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b7c84dbd5ffa84cafb4beba8abe0cc5ce67938ce2e7b5d2126748ef0d33974e59960ca66d3832074211dc9240b7c35af696f94c8f7f3e09a)**

Thank you,

Lara Trump
Senior Advisor,
Donald J. Trump for President, 2020 ** [CONTRIBUTE $1](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b7c84dbd5ffa84caa2e0d53f8b33eaa639ec18499411a335a77d70f5aa4dde02e2bd26291ba942c11e53f23fa9197a4f5fc01060430f607b)**

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. **NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, OR CONTRIBUTION NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN.** Contributing will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking [here](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a812140c6801e6284ca02b76a730e44fde078f7f308d542eacb52ea51ac7d4f6457778496a31461917c774e8b1070e8da0fe71b98a145371). Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking [here ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=a812140c6801e628ad101056701dd3b38d5a80ba63f4bd75b4bf2e4795714bf4882052bfb881a4d53d292ece8afead6bc88743d57a94bffe). Entries must be received between July 16, 2018, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on July 25, 2018, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winners will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations and tickets to attend the rally (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). name: Peter Joffrion
subject: Time to flip AL-05
body:
Hi there,
People ask how we're going to flip AL-05, and I always tell them we're going to win by working three times harder and smarter than my opponent.
We'll knock on tens of thousands of doors and make even more phone calls. The plan is to connect with voters however and whenever we can. The people of North Alabama are ready for a change in leadership -- Mo Brooks does not represent our values.
I've got an incredible team of volunteers working alongside me to make sure we execute our strategy to win because North Alabamians deserve better. Plain and simple.
Here’s the thing: if we're going to connect one-on-one with voters, we're going to need the resources to reach them. We need mailers and placards to leave at the doors when no one’s home, and we need to build up our staff to grow our grassroots movement of volunteers.
Today, I'm reaching out because I need your help. In the second fundraising quarter, we outraised Mo Brooks by $60k, but he told _WHNT19_ that he has more than enough money in his war chest to beat me in November.
This will be a tough race, but I know we can build the grassroots movement we need to win if we have the resources to execute our strategy every single day in the field. If you’re able, pitch in now to show Mo the strength behind our efforts.
Here's the link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peterjoffrion4alabama](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1721255/9136320/172365608?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWYyMmI0Yi01MjhmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wWlQSxZnxyAI5nUv4x1zVpamEY2V_yfh34_1A4qvB5g=&refcode=20180724)**
Thank you kindly,
Peter

Peter Joffrion for Congress
P.O. Box 2102
Huntsville, AL 35804
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/af0060d8-b08e-e811-80c2-000d3a12bbb1/39f22b4b-528f-e811-80c2-000d3a12bbb1?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOWYyMmI0Yi01MjhmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wWlQSxZnxyAI5nUv4x1zVpamEY2V_yfh34_1A4qvB5g=&id=110339827&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

name: =?US-ASCII?Q?The_White_House?=
subject: Three words: Made in America
body:
| |
---
The White House • July 24, 2018
## **The Day Ahead**
Visiting Missouri, President Donald J. Trump will speak at the national convention for the Veterans of Foreign Wars of the United States**.**[Watch live at 12:30 p.m. ET.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI0LjkyOTE0NTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNC45MjkxNDUxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3OTI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/live/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)****
## **Three words: Made in America**
**Boots from Texas** , snowboards from Colorado, F-150 trucks from Michigan, and baseball bats from Pennsylvania—yesterday, products proudly made in the United States were on full display at President Trump’s second annual “Made in America” exhibit at the White House. **American manufacturing is back** , as yesterday’s event showed the world. Nearly 350,000 manufacturing jobs have been created since President Trump took office, and surveys show that optimism among U.S. manufacturers recently hit an all-time high. “Our leaders in Washington did nothing—they did nothing. They let our factories leave. They let our people lose their jobs,” President Trump said. **“That’s not free trade. That’s fool’s trade,”** the President added. **America can do better—and it has.** As a first order of business, President Trump is renegotiating past trade deals to benefit American workers. That tough line has already paid off: The Administration secured key changes to America’s trade agreement with South Korea, which includes provisions to increase U.S. automobile exports. [Made in America: Businesses and workers are thriving under President Trump](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI0LjkyOTE0NTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNC45MjkxNDUxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3OTI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/made-america-businesses-workers-thriving-president-donald-j-trump/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)**** **Watch****:**[See some of the great products made right here in the USA](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI0LjkyOTE0NTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNC45MjkxNDUxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3OTI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EPgwvFovjLA&feature=youtu.be)****
## Senate confirms new Veterans Affairs leader
**In an 86-9 vote last night,** the Senate confirmed President Trump’s choice to lead the Department of Veterans Affairs, Lieutenant Colonel Robert Wilkie. **The son of a wounded combat soldier,** Wilkie understands the crucial role the VA plays for America’s veterans and their families. Wilkie himself is a veteran, having served on active duty from 2009 to 2010 and again in 2014. He is currently a United States Air Force Reservist. **“He has displayed great patriotism** and a commitment to supporting and empowering America’s armed forces and veterans,” [President Trump said](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI0LjkyOTE0NTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNC45MjkxNDUxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3OTI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/statement-president-confirmation-robert-wilkie-secretary-veterans-affairs/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) of Secretary Wilkie. “Under his leadership, I have no doubt that the Department of Veterans Affairs will continue to make strides.” [Learn why Robert Wilkie is the right choice to lead Veterans Affairs.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwNzI0LjkyOTE0NTExJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDcyNC45MjkxNDUxMSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4MzU3OTI2JmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/robert-wilkie-right-choice-department-veterans-affairs/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Photo of the Day
### Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen
**President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks at the Made in America Product Showcase at the White House** | July 23, 2018

clean_body: | | The White House • July 24, 2018 The Day Ahead Visiting Missouri, President Donald J. Trump will speak at the national convention for the Veterans of Foreign Wars of the United States.** Three words: Made in America Boots from Texas , snowboards from Colorado, F-150 trucks from Michigan, and baseball bats from Pennsylvania—yesterday, products proudly made in the United States were on full display at President Trump’s second annual “Made in America” exhibit at the White House. American manufacturing is back , as yesterday’s event showed the world. Nearly 350,000 manufacturing jobs have been created since President Trump took office, and surveys show that optimism among U.S. manufacturers recently hit an all-time high. “Our leaders in Washington did nothing—they did nothing. They let our factories leave. They let our people lose their jobs,” President Trump said. “That’s not free trade. That’s fool’s trade,” the President added. America can do better—and it has. As a first order of business, President Trump is renegotiating past trade deals to benefit American workers. That tough line has already paid off: The Administration secured key changes to America’s trade agreement with South Korea, which includes provisions to increase U.S. automobile exports. Watch**:** Senate confirms new Veterans Affairs leader In an 86-9 vote last night, the Senate confirmed President Trump’s choice to lead the Department of Veterans Affairs, Lieutenant Colonel Robert Wilkie. The son of a wounded combat soldier, Wilkie understands the crucial role the VA plays for America’s veterans and their families. Wilkie himself is a veteran, having served on active duty from 2009 to 2010 and again in 2014. He is currently a United States Air Force Reservist. “He has displayed great patriotism and a commitment to supporting and empowering America’s armed forces and veterans,” of Secretary Wilkie. “Under his leadership, I have no doubt that the Department of Veterans Affairs will continue to make strides.” Photo of the Day Official White House Photo by D. Myles Cullen President Donald J. Trump delivers remarks at the Made in America Product Showcase at the White House** | July 23, 2018 | | The White House · 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW · Washington DC 20500 · 202-456-1111

name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Creating more opportunities right here in Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1GmdoZ6gJ7lO60iQzCSpV8XWHpRilAH24aQN7OwtRVc=/ViLdUzA5Cb8E3410XXsPgy2VWNxZ4Mw4TWU5znReiK4=) Friends and Neighbors -- Florida's Chief Financial Officer (CFO) may not make headlines - or make it into your push notifications all that often - but they have one of the most important jobs in our state. From overseeing state accounting functions to serving on the state Clemency Board and as a trustee to the Retirement System, the CFO plays a pivotal role in helping the cabinet and state government run efficiently and in making sure that _YOUR_ tax dollars are being spent in the way you were promised they would be. All of these aspects of the job description are essential to keeping our state running - but I also believe that the CFO role has the potential to be even bigger than that. I believe that the Chief Financial Officer can also be - if I may - the Chief Innovation Officer. As your next CFO, I would bring a wealth of innovative business and leadership experience to the cabinet - **and use my own job to create more job opportunities, right here in Florida.** [Help Jeremy Get to the Cabinet. Chip in $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/1GmdoZ6gJ7lO60iQzCSpV8XWHpRilAH24aQN7OwtRVc=/is_rFKqG4dQIvocAdUWZ-e91czg3iXPpqxeoZPG5RA4=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) As your next CFO, one of my top priorities would be using my experience in the tech sector and the State Senate to create, promote and implement forward thinking policies that would aim to both keep and create tech sector and other innovative centered jobs right here in the Sunshine State, fostering an innovation economy, to set a national standard, ready made for the 21st century. But I have to get to the Cabinet first. **And I can 't get there without your help**. [**Can you contribute $20.18 or more today - and help me bring our innovative vision to the cabinet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/1GmdoZ6gJ7lO60iQzCSpV8XWHpRilAH24aQN7OwtRVc=/is_rFKqG4dQIvocAdUWZ-e91czg3iXPpqxeoZPG5RA4=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: Justin Jones
subject: They called my boss "the Tough Guy"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter,

The positive coverage keeps pouring in, and I wanted to share the latest with you.

Entitled "[This Democrat Is Running as the Tough Guy](https://act.myngp.com/el/kEmLVCpX2mUgrGdcc4CTMpajf3qxYvGKK3BcvT8vcYs=/ix2KNYhvn2iY2UDKLASHdyqV9aKp_OKBq-3EKE8ozAQ=)," this Bloomberg piece affirms Abigail's experience as a former CIA officer and her common-sense approach to foreign policy "flips the narrative on a Trump-friendly Republican incumbent."

The article highlights Abigail's engagement with the citizens of the 7th District and praises her willingness to talk about the issues that matter most to voters, something our opponent, Congressman Dave Brat, continues to avoid.

As the author states: **" Brat shows little interest in debating an opponent who seems to know more about global and local issues than he does."**

This article recognizes that Abigail is a new kind of candidate - one who perfectly fits the evolving nature of the 7th district and has exactly what it takes to win in November.

[Will you help us continue the fight to Election Day by donating now to our historic campaign?](https://act.myngp.com/el/kEmLVCpX2mUgrGdcc4CTMpajf3qxYvGKK3BcvT8vcYs=/lDPW8oWvWR6gdTtAekJPQURHKSaz_EWLFL477iTMXvA=?refcode=jj72318) Your donation will help spread the word to voters that Abigail is the right candidate for the district

As excited as we are about the positive press, we are even more excited to continue working on your behalf to bring accessible, principled leadership back to Washington.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kEmLVCpX2mUgrGdcc4CTMpajf3qxYvGKK3BcvT8vcYs=/-SvLcjFe4vfj53drohSRGOGj9BWPAap4DeYFl4xgJuk=?refcode=jj72318)
Regards,

Justin Jones
Communications Director, Spanberger for Congress

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/kEmLVCpX2mUgrGdcc4CTMpajf3qxYvGKK3BcvT8vcYs=/_bbA_saS9PWAEbNULADze5Vb1pVd1dlBm28cS7Op6O8=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Ted Cruz
subject: My opponent wants to impeach the President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
This is extreme.
---

Fellow Conservative,
His cards are out on the table. My opponent is calling for the impeachment of President Trump...
He is running to be on the jury to make sure President Trump is removed from office. **This is extreme**. He is letting Hollywood call the shots for Texas. **[This is why I need your help. We are being outraised, and we need to do everything we can to make sure the Democrats don't gain another vote... in Texas.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA1LTJjZTQ2MzdlYmRjNDQwNzQ5YWViMmZiMGVkZDg1NGMy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb250cmlidXRlLnRlZGNydXoub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1BRS1HT1AzJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNzI0X0FFLUdPUDNfVGVkQ3J1eiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDE4MDcyNF9NeU9wcG9uZW50V2FudHNUb0ltcGVhY2hUaGVQcmVzaWRlbnQ&K=rjsszGOhn47p1JXE8YcHyA)**
Calls for impeachment are getting more and more frequent, as we are seeing, and it's only going to get worse. It could become closer to reality if the Democrats are able to get the majority in both houses of Congress. **[We need to make sure that we are able to keep our majority in the Senate and #KeepTexasRed. Whatever you can afford to contribute will help my campaign and help me continue to be able to fight for our shared conservative values.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA1LTJjZTQ2MzdlYmRjNDQwNzQ5YWViMmZiMGVkZDg1NGMy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb250cmlidXRlLnRlZGNydXoub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1BRS1HT1AzJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNzI0X0FFLUdPUDNfVGVkQ3J1eiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDE4MDcyNF9NeU9wcG9uZW50V2FudHNUb0ltcGVhY2hUaGVQcmVzaWRlbnQ&K=Kbh8u9J1AJl6Vvg1LF7zNQ)**
This kind of far-left extremism from my opponent may work well for his Hollywood donors, but doesn't represent the vast majority of Texans. And I am proud to represent all 28 million Texans.
For Liberty,

Ted Cruz
**[P.S. The best way to make sure this never becomes a reality is to become a recurring donor. Giving to my campaign every month will make sure we have the resources to fight back.](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA1LTJjZTQ2MzdlYmRjNDQwNzQ5YWViMmZiMGVkZDg1NGMy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb250cmlidXRlLnRlZGNydXoub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1BRS1HT1AzJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNzI0X0FFLUdPUDNfVGVkQ3J1eiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDE4MDcyNF9NeU9wcG9uZW50V2FudHNUb0ltcGVhY2hUaGVQcmVzaWRlbnQ&K=tnk0SNxuv5YbHAWgq4rF4w)** | [**DONATE**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE4MjA1LTJjZTQ2MzdlYmRjNDQwNzQ5YWViMmZiMGVkZDg1NGMy%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3AYm9keV9pbWdfYnV0dG9uX2RvbmF0ZQ%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9jb250cmlidXRlLnRlZGNydXoub3JnL2RvbmF0ZS8_cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1BRS1HT1AzJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMTgwNzI0X0FFLUdPUDNfVGVkQ3J1eiZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDE4MDcyNF9NeU9wcG9uZW50V2FudHNUb0ltcGVhY2hUaGVQcmVzaWRlbnQ&K=3KdZkG8BmPZ1lYvr3ZFCnA)

name: Steve Sisolak
subject: I’m committed to moving Nevada forward
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS FOR STEVE SISOLAK
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8GwJa-5pHrdxjS9u35Z2WsstwakudHoOEYdhvlEoSzc=/XKAfYdiJpdvBKGiwgYz1Ac8LdeQv0sdneBkaSJ_19dY=?gpsid=37_57_2244&refcode=em18_180724_eom1_fnd_gq_act__ss_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180724_eom1_fnd_gq_act__ss_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)
---

Friend,

Keeping Nevada strong. Investing in education. Attracting new and growing businesses that will put people to work. Improving access to affordable health care. These are the reasons I'm running for governor, and these issues are the foundation of our campaign.

These are also the reasons why Adam Laxalt, Donald Trump, and their special interest allies are attacking me. While I'm committed to moving Nevada forward, my opponent has a dark vision, dictated by his billionaire-class donors, that will only take us backward.

**[I know that with the help of people like you, we can fight back and win. But we need your help to meet our important end-of-month fundraising deadline -- will you contribute $5 to keep our campaign going strong through November?](https://act.myngp.com/el/8GwJa-5pHrdxjS9u35Z2WsstwakudHoOEYdhvlEoSzc=/XKAfYdiJpdvBKGiwgYz1Ac8LdeQv0sdneBkaSJ_19dY=?gpsid=37_57_2244&refcode=em18_180724_eom1_fnd_gq_act__ss_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180724_eom1_fnd_gq_act__ss_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Special interests like the Koch network are spending a fortune trying to cover up the fact that Laxalt is against ideas that will help working families. We know he's committed to stripping health care from thousands of Nevadans, attacking a woman's right to choose, and refusing to address the gun violence epidemic.

**[We can't allow a few wealthy individuals to buy this election for Adam Laxalt and his extreme agenda. Please help us keep up the pace by donating before our deadline at the end of the month.](https://act.myngp.com/el/8GwJa-5pHrdxjS9u35Z2WsstwakudHoOEYdhvlEoSzc=/XKAfYdiJpdvBKGiwgYz1Ac8LdeQv0sdneBkaSJ_19dY=?gpsid=37_57_2244&refcode=em18_180724_eom1_fnd_gq_act__ss_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180724_eom1_fnd_gq_act__ss_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ssiso)**

name: Josh Hawley
subject: Happy Birthday, Claire McCaskill!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate[Click here to unsubscribe
body:
Today, July 24th, is Claire McCaskill’s birthday! Today, July 24th, is Claire McCaskill’s birthday!
As you might remember, Claire McCaskill has previously celebrated her birthday with Obama, shortly before endorsing Hillary Clinton for President.
Today isn’t just her birthday, it’s a reminder that another year has passed of Claire McCaskill failing Missourians.

clean_body: Today, July 24th, is Claire McCaskill’s birthday! Today, July 24th, is Claire McCaskill’s birthday! As you might remember, Claire McCaskill has previously celebrated her birthday with Obama, shortly before endorsing Hillary Clinton for President. Today isn’t just her birthday, it’s a reminder that another year has passed of Claire McCaskill failing Missourians. What a fitting time then, for Missouri to welcome President Trump to our state on McCaskill's birthday this year. The President is visiting the Show me State today, and I’m sure he will remind us all why Missourians overwhelmingly voted for him over the policies that Claire McCaskill supports. Wish the Senator a happy birthday, or maybe let her know that Missourians have had enough of her liberal, obstructionist ways. For Missouri, Josh Hawley Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

name: Anna Bukowski, tinaforminnesota.com
subject: Norm Coleman's dark money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Coleman can flood the state with tons of special interest money.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b916/c1f7015/6b164607/11425c46/999009336/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-july?refcode=rtw_20180724_em-A") Friends, we just got word Norm Coleman -- one of the largest dark money operatives in Minnesota -- hosted a high dollar fundraiser for our Republican opponent. Coleman has the ability to flood the state with tons of special interest money -- in fact, the _Minneapolis Star Tribune_ said he "wields more clout inside the Republican Party than he did when he was a senator." Now, he is organizing special interest PACs and big donors to defeat Tina and turn Minnesota red. With our deadline coming tomorrow at midnight your support has never been more important. name: Bob Corney, Bredesen 2018
subject: It’s a trap!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BREDESEN FOR SENATE
body:
#
Team --
They promised their “Death Star” was approaching. They promised they’d inflict “death by 10,000 cuts” on our campaign. And they promised they were going to tear down Phil Bredesen and “constantly punch him in his face... over and over and over again.”
Now, here they come...
**Two out-of-state PACs have just committed millions of dollars to this race, promising to prop up our opponent and attack Phil Bredesen.**
[**Can you chip in $15 or whatever you can to our campaign right now to help us fight back against the coming Death Star attacks? We need to make sure we have the resources necessary to set the record straight with Tennessee voters, and your support will be a key part of that.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1723268/9147131/-1069577967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmI5ZmRhYi02OThmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=shHcTmFiQ-fubq1sBV4-w98-tJwTJTAx9ysrC25mHWs=&refcode=em180724-pacs-miss&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=15)

This comes just days after we announced our quarterly FEC report that shows our growing momentum, which is why the Washington establishment and their network of mega-donors and dark money groups are committed to spending any price to buy this election.
We can’t afford to let that happen. We need to keep this race focused on the issues that matter to Tennesseans and not get caught up in the partisan noise coming out of Washington.
[**Can you help us get that done? Chip in $15 or whatever you can today so we can stay focused on running this campaign the right way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1723270/9147133/-1069577967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmI5ZmRhYi02OThmLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmJiYjEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=shHcTmFiQ-fubq1sBV4-w98-tJwTJTAx9ysrC25mHWs=&refcode=em180724-pacs-miss&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=15)

name: John Gregg
subject: Joe and me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Polling shows the race is neck-and-neck. And Joe's opponent, GOP Representative Mike Braun, has a lot of heavy-hitters with big money backing him up. They've already spent millions of dollars attackin |
---

| | Peter -- I'll be honest: My friend Joe Donnelly has a tough fight ahead of him.

Polling shows the race is neck-and-neck. And Joe's opponent, GOP Representative Mike Braun, has a lot of heavy-hitters with big money backing him up. They've already spent millions of dollars attacking Joe. I'm sure you've seen their ads on TV.

But Joe is building the type of campaign that can beat their big money. He's already bringing the Hoosier work ethic to this race, but **there 's another important piece of this campaign that only you can provide: grassroots support.**

**Today I 'm asking you, Peter: Will you send Joe a contribution to defeat Rep. Braun in November? Chip in now.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2f7a/7377f838/3dcc5fab/51f9951b/2509676388/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-johngregg?express_lane=true&refcode=20180724.1nd&amount=5")**

Why do I think Joe can win in November, despite his ranking as the _most vulnerable Democratic senator in the country?_ **Because he knows how to win tough races.** Back in 2012, we had a hard road ahead of us -- but I was on the campaign trail with him and saw how Joe and his team never stopped fighting and squeezed the most out of every dollar.

**In the end, Joe won, despite being greatly outspent by special interests.** This year, it's critical we re-elect him because we need to keep his bipartisan, independent voice in the Senate working for us.

**Let me put it plainly: Joe can 't win this race without you. And your contribution is worth the most now. **[Will you stand with me and chip in today to give my friend Joe the support he needs to win?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2f7a/7377f838/3dcc5fab/51f99516/2509676388/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-johngregg?refcode=20180724.1nd&amount=10")****

clean_body: Polling shows the race is neck-and-neck. And Joe's opponent, GOP Representative Mike Braun, has a lot of heavy-hitters with big money backing him up. They've already spent millions of dollars attackin | | | Peter -- I'll be honest: My friend Joe Donnelly has a tough fight ahead of him. Polling shows the race is neck-and-neck. And Joe's opponent, GOP Representative Mike Braun, has a lot of heavy-hitters with big money backing him up. They've already spent millions of dollars attacking Joe. I'm sure you've seen their ads on TV. But Joe is building the type of campaign that can beat their big money. He's already bringing the Hoosier work ethic to this race, but there 's another important piece of this campaign that only you can provide: grassroots support. Today I 'm asking you, Peter: Will you send Joe a contribution to defeat Rep. Braun in November? Chip in now. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" Why do I think Joe can win in November, despite his ranking as the most vulnerable Democratic senator in the country? Because he knows how to win tough races. Back in 2012, we had a hard road ahead of us -- but I was on the campaign trail with him and saw how Joe and his team never stopped fighting and squeezed the most out of every dollar. In the end, Joe won, despite being greatly outspent by special interests. This year, it's critical we re-elect him because we need to keep his bipartisan, independent voice in the Senate working for us. Let me put it plainly: Joe can 't win this race without you. And your contribution is worth the most now. ""** "" Thanks, John Gregg ******** ""******** ** | Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206 ""

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: Richard Painter Newsletter (Week of July 8)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22&n=1)
---
Friend -- **Here’s what Richard has been up to the past week** :With three weeks left until the DFL Primary, Richard has been actively traveling around the state to meet with voters and discuss important issues. On **Monday** , Richard met with John Thompson for lunch. Following the death of his friend, Philando Castile, Thompson founded Fight for Justine LLC and has become an important community activist. John and Richard discussed criminal justice reform among other issues. The Painter team held an Anti-Corruption Rally at Metro State University on **Tuesday** with 200 attendees. Richard spoke on a variety of issues to energize the crowd regarding health care, protecting Minnesota waterways, rejecting PAC money in politics, and fighting against corruption. He followed up his speech by taking questions from voters. Richard’s speech was preceded by Jamar Nelson, Suud Olat, and Leah Phifer who spoke on why they support Painter. Tim McGuire from MPR and Latisha from Insight News covered the event and conducted interviews with Richard before the rally. A video of the Rally can be seen here: [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3D7KSAoK4no28&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22&n=2) On Wednesday, Richard attended the Children’s Defense Fund Social Action Day. Dedicated advocates across Minnesota gathered to speak for pulling children out of poverty, improving access to healthcare and education, as well as ensuring protection from abuse. Richard spoke on the importance of protecting Medicaid and the many children who depend upon it. Later, Richard and his wife Karen were interviewed by Paul Metsa, a legendary musician and songwriter from Minnesota, for a human interest interview to get to know Richard, Karen, and their family. That evening, Richard attended an Indivisible event at the Oxboro Library in Bloomington. Richard and the campaign team spent **Thursday** and **Friday** in Western Minnesota meeting with voters. On Thursday, conducted a KXRA Radio interview in Alexandria with news director Joe Korkowski. He then held a Meet and Greet at the Douglas County Library to speak and answer questions from voters. Richard held another Town Hall that evening in Moorhead at the Boulder Tap House to hear from voters and speak on issues. Friday, Richard held a Meet and Greet in Willmar at The Goodness Coffee House for more Q&A. **Saturday** , Richard answered questions from voters on FaceBook Live. That evening, Richard introduced Paul Metsa at the 20th Annual NE Folk Festival at Grumpy’s Bar and Grille. We are crossing this state to talk to voters and make sure that YOUR voice is heard. Can you contribute and help us take our fight to Washington? [](http://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22&n=3 "Join the fight!") Thank you, Painter For Minnesota
[http://www.painterminnesota.com/](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22&n=4)
---
| [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRWPMinnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22&n=5) [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRWPMinnesota&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22&n=6) [ ](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Frwpminnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22&n=7)
---

Painter Minnesota · PO Box 6780, Minneapolis, MN 55406, United States

You can also keep up with Painter For Minnesota on [Twitter](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FRWPMinnesota&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22&n=9) or [Facebook](https://www.painterminnesota.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FRWPMinnesota%2F&e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_7_22&n=10).

name: Team DWS
subject: Mueller under attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress
body:
|
---
| | Friend, **Debbie is right -- Trump and the Republicans are going to keep attacking the Mueller investigation, and it 's up to us to stand up for what's right.** According to our own intelligence agencies, the Russians really did interfere in our election, and they really did it to help Trump win. But that's not what Trump wants to hear and Republicans in Congress are working overtime to torpedo the Mueller investigation. [**We need to gather another 4,768 signatures on our petition to protect the special counsel 's investigation into Russian meddling in our elections. If you haven't yet, add your name to the list and send a message to Washington.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f10/622b7b5b/1bf6cf43/307b9b3e/2888255065/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180719c") Trump's lawyers are calling for an end to Mueller's investigation. Trump's allies in Congress have talked about getting rid of the investigation altogether. And day after day, we learn a little more about what happened in 2016. All of that stops if Trump and the GOP get their way. [**Sign our petition and stand up for the truth.**](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113f10/622b7b5b/1bf6cf43/307b9b3e/2888255065/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180719c") Thanks, Team DWS
---

name: Mark Warner
subject: Worst-case scenario
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, there are no easy days in the Senate - especially lately.

Tim and I are representing Virginia in Washington, and that has meant being vocal on the frontlines of keeping families together and questioning President Trump's Supreme Court nominee to make sure we don't move an inch backwards on our progress.

It's a tough job, but Tim is tougher. He's known to throw hardball questions at confirmation hearings and not yield on the floor when fighting for our values.

**Mitigating the chaos in Washington is a full-time job, but Tim also has to campaign this year. And he has to do it well - because losing him in the Senate would be devastating.**

[Tim hasn't had a lot of time to fundraise this month, and he could fall short of his July goal. Will you chip in to Tim's campaign today to make sure he reaches his goal and can stay focused on fighting back in the Senate?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f123d/3e0906/6eaaf570/3e35c275/2943739456/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180724_1_FR_MW_Surrogate-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Tim+hasnrsquot+had+a+lot+of+time+to+fund&utm_campaign=20180724_1_FR_MW_Surrogate-LDND&source=20180724_1_FR_MW_Surrogate-LDND")

Tim's goals are high because he's building a campaign this year that is focusing on the long-term: using new digital tools and voter mobilization strategies that will help House candidates this year AND state legislature candidates next year.

At the end of the day, Tim is going to prioritize fighting for Virginia and for what is right - _but missing this July goal would be a worst-case scenario._

clean_body: | | Derek, there are no easy days in the Senate - especially lately. Tim and I are representing Virginia in Washington, and that has meant being vocal on the frontlines of keeping families together and questioning President Trump's Supreme Court nominee to make sure we don't move an inch backwards on our progress. It's a tough job, but Tim is tougher. He's known to throw hardball questions at confirmation hearings and not yield on the floor when fighting for our values. Mitigating the chaos in Washington is a full-time job, but Tim also has to campaign this year. And he has to do it well - because losing him in the Senate would be devastating. "" Tim's goals are high because he's building a campaign this year that is focusing on the long-term: using new digital tools and voter mobilization strategies that will help House candidates this year AND state legislature candidates next year. At the end of the day, Tim is going to prioritize fighting for Virginia and for what is right - but missing this July goal would be a worst-case scenario. If everyone reading this chips in, we can help Tim fill the $27,500 gap so that he can reach his goal and continue to build a game-changing program for Virginia Democrats: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for investing in Tim, good things to come in Virginia for 2018 and beyond. Mark Warner "" "" * | "" "" ""

name: Wayne MacDonald
subject: What district are you in??
body:
Derek,
What are your thoughts on the upcoming election? I'm feeling optimistic. Very optimistic.
There are 11 short weeks until election day and we have hundreds of candidates running to keep New Hampshire on the right track. We have had tremendous success this cycle and the Democrats want to rip it all to shreds.
I'm confident we can win and stop the obstruction, but not without intensive training.
Are you willing to**[sponsor a candidate?](http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=3qP3xl6Iy86fMdiFlFopyBO5kQrx-2FesLRaGJ1fd7TCqcycBI512yYjvguVrkx1y-2Fz9KPysRoLmviHiSY-2BFOWSIYFcHWNKWwYsOqY8NyLIPBeAD7ITyCZOQrQYfZclj01nCKI4WGr-2Fb9jJeDMlE4SIQ-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MIwCiEQRcvXdV-2BaQ-2ByiYxJHqVavqEWhm1x5iOlhTe3blh69CHtuI49xOGwqrkNu-2FDIF8-2BxHyWDp4rMiM7u0g0g7UtmXwVK1cWUbgQn87w-2FeqCDsbgBVMdZnpznLD0L-2FYQ2rj6eXVTtFsT5lxg3tLLXJqESSwDStzh6W-2FRbW8iOnCcmBs-2FYYj6O6rsKUw62kyB4Oo-2B5G-2FGm0-2Bx8LU7HbvCX1atT0oCPOdkTqRq1t1iz-2FfiLoEZneITWGUK8TIkTItme5vZPcHWiabtYkqpe64eng-3D-3D)** A full-day training comes at a cost, but we need to make sure candidates in your district and beyond learn how to run and learn how to win.

body:

[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa901/34a064cc/bf28cfc/70eb999/3084026089/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends - Since launching this campaign over a year ago, our people-powered movement hasn't stopped gaining momentum. And we haven't stopped talking about the issues affecting Georgia families. Issues like building excellent public schools and investing in every child from cradle to career. Like ensuring job creation in all 159 counties in Georgia, especially in our rural counties which are so often left behind. When the polls close tonight, we will have our official Republican opponent. We don't know who he will be, but we know he's going to do everything he can to prevent us from making our vision for Georgia a reality. So we're asking: **[Will you make a donation before the polls close tonight to show our opponent-- whoever he is -- that we will _never_ stop fighting for Georgia families?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa901/34a064cc/bf28cfc/70eb9a6/3084026089/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwNzI0MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-gop-runoff?refcode=IE072418-full")** Thank you for supporting our movement, -- Team Abrams

body:
When will the Republicans in the legislature stop trying to strip the constitution of checks and balances?
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b2e/2fde7c66/46c781cc/156826bd/3379882657/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-specialsession?gpsid=8_43_2250&refcode=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
When will it stop, friend?

When will the Republicans in the legislature stop trying to strip the constitution of checks and balances?

**Here's a quick background on what just happened:**

Republicans in the legislature voted to put a bunch of harmful and unnecessary constitutional amendments on the November ballot. They know that many of their amendments are unpopular, so they just called themselves back for a special session to write misleading ballot language to deceive voters.

And here's the kicker -- there was already a bipartisan board tasked with writing objective captions. But Republicans in the legislature are so worried about what North Carolinians would think if they saw what the GOP was really up to, they came in to write their own captions.

**[In short, they're trying to deceive you into voting for their harmful changes to our constitution. Chip in today to help us Break the Majority in November and end this nonsense:](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b2e/2fde7c66/46c781cc/156826bc/3379882657/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-specialsession?gpsid=8_43_2250&refcode=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=2+-+In+short+theyre+trying+to+deceive+you+in&source=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203b2e/2fde7c66/46c781cc/156826bf/3379882657/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-specialsession?gpsid=8_43_2250&refcode=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&utm_content=3+-++ask++raquo&source=em18_180724_session_fnd_gq_ful__RC_ettx")

Mike Levin’s name on your radar.

Mike is fighting for families in California supporting
measures that strengthen our healthcare system and help us tackle
the issue of climate change.

But his campaign needs your help.

Can you rush a contribution now to help him mobilize voting
efforts in his district?

will fight for what’s right and oppose some of the reckless
policies of the GOP.

it without help from supporters like you.

Your contribution helps Mike Levin maintain a robust
grassroots field team that plans to reach out to thousands of
voters. Can he count on you?
( https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thompson-levin?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_180724_1_1&amount=25.00&recurring=true&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D )

URGENT, team: Nevada is the **TOP** Senate race in the entire country - and right now, **things are not looking good for Democrats.**
Last month, Donald Trump flew to Nevada to rake in cash for GOP extremist Dean Heller at a **$25,000-per-person fundraiser and helped Heller to his _best fundraising quarter EVER. _**

Then, a Mitch McConnell-linked super PAC and a McConnell-linked dark money group pledged to spend a combined **$15.8 MILLION** to defeat us.
**The GOP is going all in on Nevada, and it's working: The polls show this race is neck and neck, and _The Washington Post_ just named Nevada the #1 Senate race in the country most likely to flip parties**** ****- ****[so the ONLY way we can flip this seat _and_ the Senate blue is if grassroots supporters like you step up to help us close the fundraising gap IMMEDIATELY.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1e5/4fbb2af3/7b7c6d57/5e8b7423/3649495963/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azg2Mi1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk862-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

name: Jeanne Shaheen
subject: Trump and Putin's shady deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shaheen for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends,

A dozen Russian intelligence officials were indicted last week for helping Vladimir Putin manipulate the 2016 election. Then just 72 hours later, Donald Trump stood by Putin's side and flat-out betrayed the U.S., bowing down to Putin and undermining our intelligence community in one fell swoop.
**It 's no wonder Trump's being investigated for his ties to Russia - and Friends, I am ready to fight to get to the truth**.

I'm calling for a hearing with the interpreter present at the meeting between Trump and Putin to figure out what was _really_ said. The American people deserve to know what deals our president is making behind closed doors with one of our biggest adversaries.
I'm doing everything I can to hold Donald Trump accountable for his actions, but **I need to hear where you stand** :
| | **Should Donald Trump tell us what he discussed with Putin?**

---
| | | [YES](https://surveys.signforgood.com/cjs-trump-russia?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk871-su-nd)
---
| [NO](https://surveys.signforgood.com/cjs-trump-russia?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk871-su-nd)
---
Thank you,

Jeanne
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0e0070c525a498da7d567c7ba87b35d&_e=Kz76rfrwEUVNIoUvn1DeiSZKRFAvZnOg3UVLphsPeouiwNY4kP7EjGY2b2LB3DavdDxmpxGu3h0VPpCLW9-mkyh2b16uTT08W40x6HwEqu3py_2k1bAQnexpSqieeBH4Msh-dHuLk9P-eX1NvSYo0_o8-aT-i5k4si5k9t0kIDbHOREpJXyF6imZZwG7QV8COuH0PdRuHWpFq0LScjE2nORZuxzwbp9_Ja9G_xydemxDZhzBWem-ItIeUnlH9R92). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0e0070c525a498da7d567c7ba87b35d&_e=VnajE7c0FvBs6FfOJVr3ntTO41NKfm0HcbOk57O-cOJLtTJCF0M8T5ed2f99oggybs4MT_eP7gi8zNAl7gaHA0rw2vx56T4BETfeiPFXbp1FmUYSP3i2HAG7A8FduQ1LN92txrcU4AdTvQ28jGHUZUFGR3S-gYScgfPDtmmjxOBRw746xM7oor8-7RTeJ47dZA3chRm36pwtWmDO7pc-ML9DS13Og3Tqu-wSLCLQ08JVdxfbCUjZr72CsJkQWr20tHRLuMbqKKNTrEezD5qtIzRGkrNYzKWTLlstBAGYrmZt1KMhzAY5UzoSgF64rnIB1tlA5thi3eZajxfYaX_XxLBAMVv00K1jRhJK1JfQy-D51xE2m3BNAVO1snnmu5BX) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0e0070c525a498da7d567c7ba87b35d&_e=VnajE7c0FvBs6FfOJVr3ntTO41NKfm0HcbOk57O-cOJVB5blXL7x9cRf6T1Dd-5gAQSYDlxGgusrEf5BdlWos1PppDERpGP7wD8MhebV1vz9OlVX1LTURIt5lGb7MHH8X4z1SZ-Pzo5DVOU1ewygPRHYK-bvVBILttIdWPT28keLb6VVmSMNlhnTT18l30g3ORSrM5cUEZfDbrHr8cg3ESltcUnh_flCSBuAYEWIMy3SLLVjpUiD_ZFbEiskx6qjgiIXYLOYIjPjzCNdYPGsqKQOnSwiGe9jvwPlj0eIlBh5fwwWoDs4rjvlH8WPPcMJqNrhpnoTJiGNmzyeESsgrSiuc9F3jIuk8URkq4SCPrT7OkmSyqNBRsQhSsLovNSA) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0e0070c525a498da7d567c7ba87b35d&_e=VnajE7c0FvBs6FfOJVr3nitAmF8jBiUKU8Y5jN3e5UCORidBmL6nSlBvSIVh-iU7_I7zvGpoGgHomMPOlS3R0KCzvFDMYickH1RBTekHV_bBawc2esGkO2dmTo68OI2XXKYHBrjU8C0PuNTnLYCYDLEAb4YfC_Jq7R7q-qPsmGFBUk8vb3-U0S_bgxDfWVZN6HoVaQ2J4qxwpxwfmWDiUXRj2Q5ZuACS9-Lw7ymHBPQstDsjIaZfVNzCXvfYI-CX9b7f8Jd1IMjB2W6IMCj6mA%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0e0070c525a498da7d567c7ba87b35d&_e=VnajE7c0FvBs6FfOJVr3nmxK9UYbQr_MKASzX7JATzQVR7FEvdMFvizMgTmyncXYXJQdPGl7MUGbRDhXGSRWML6Qo0SBorrNU9cbMX-PkwDGqhJ1bcZtuS2cOh5tCkT23ev2e6qMNVawhUdJp-bl0qe26rtdaRosGRFBRlMmIA23_YSHtbsbk0p62VKdAcROtR5n6Q6ikI4Yy6L4FfnSpv4hI5LB7OmM3OO7rzUk8BPFl_qydJ1ew2ORSUwMVyIW3xQ7QLz8HEjGlCyTZUX6VQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0e0070c525a498da7d567c7ba87b35d&_e=VnajE7c0FvBs6FfOJVr3nl40I7mBbfr1IYx17wRH08ARy1nVbwBu8qQZpDFRpiyTr9WLGvKI0h2y5Rdd1tBJenlTjSM9qjWhZfRXQWbEgCwfBeaZtdMYRY8q5x8qtlWGQY6Nnp12f0htv9klzHSBpzK5HY9PvPUPqkPQNiyAWTtwAhHJSax3xJgDSGIRnVWbAoloavjime-vXDEVsH_kKBMic5er2-l5byg91hlhkhEn9s6lxQG0iBSs0o9vboSA0cmlT84BW6ZjP3tAcv0-5Q%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=e0e0070c525a498da7d567c7ba87b35d&_e=VnajE7c0FvBs6FfOJVr3ntTO41NKfm0HcbOk57O-cOJXZby9uwUgX2Y7e76Fl9J-p-nJdFRA6EA8wrOPXpmWLdz_MhquLUi0xtQA-iyqUezzw3KbZ-1kBho8r6KChQp2QIUaQ1jzBcOGq3Vn5BsUYldOphW1lt-68DwVT1p6p6Ko-rFBFwflxnSR2KLCAKZ1nyO1WQoudnSH3GEg4Zzv-im7GHawFdeBEvvzsnZknbLJioL4w1BOA9jJ32VN3z3HR5ibH3ibe6uFfT_Da2ZE6ZHc0LZLZPmFlR3q76trN98Ex5w4JvbW2sPBHXpfncK7wxfywRctA3dqfOv6YWDgLQh5tQOvINYQu4IoqpSL3T8NIBXyGFJlBvDQfEJXVs9yP1vh2dMuYnQS-LbRTf15gQ%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. That’s how I keep my closest team members in the loop. Now if your tired of emails cluttering your inbox, I’ll be sad to see you go, but I understand. name: Dan Lipinski
subject: the case for a carbon tax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/uQy0bcze2p2s7vuTdfC0UbmlHQlJuPL47cZr2ntQXU4=/WOnLbAtu_h_MoApUPgs4cUe0VKafCUPbtOauzjOixKQ=)

Peter,

Last week, some Republican colleagues of mine in the House voted on a resolution to condemn any type of tax on carbon, in any form, across the board. We're not going to be able to combat climate change with this sort of short-sightedness.

A carbon tax is a fee imposed on the burning of carbon-based fuels, like coal, oil, and gas. It is an important tool to deter carbon-intensive consumption and pay for the damage done to the environment.

Protecting our world should not be a partisan issue, and effective, innovative tools like a carbon tax should not receive blanket rejection for no good reason.

[**Add your name if you agree that companies that destroy the earth should pay their fair share. Demand that the House GOP revoke their resolution immediately -> **](https://act.myngp.com/el/uQy0bcze2p2s7vuTdfC0UbmlHQlJuPL47cZr2ntQXU4=/7DJoeo9ygXNzV1z9inV0-ChK35XwA1YxNVtSzaBlrLE=)

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/uQy0bcze2p2s7vuTdfC0UbmlHQlJuPL47cZr2ntQXU4=/7DJoeo9ygXNzV1z9inV0-ChK35XwA1YxNVtSzaBlrLE=)
This resolution from House Republicans was not only meaningless, but is a knee jerk reaction from many on the right to disregard the dangers of man-made climate change. In fact, this resolution had the express support of several high profile climate change deniers.

Economists on both sides of the political spectrum agree that a carbon tax is one of the best tools we have to combat climate change using the innovation of the free market.

There are many on the right who believe that a carbon tax will not only reduce emissions but also benefit the economy. [**Join me if you agree that big polluters should be held accountable for the environmental degradation they cause ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uQy0bcze2p2s7vuTdfC0UbmlHQlJuPL47cZr2ntQXU4=/7DJoeo9ygXNzV1z9inV0-ChK35XwA1YxNVtSzaBlrLE=)

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/uQy0bcze2p2s7vuTdfC0UbmlHQlJuPL47cZr2ntQXU4=/7DJoeo9ygXNzV1z9inV0-ChK35XwA1YxNVtSzaBlrLE=)
Thanks for standing up to protect our world,

Dan

Thanks for your support of our campaign.

Contributions or gifts to Lipinski for Congress are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Dan Lipinski for Congress
---

Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs IL 60558 United States

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: Will you join our team of grassroots volunteers?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
This is our chance to stand up and say enough, to say we did everything we could to fight for our democracy.
#

Peter -
Earlier this month, we secured our spot on the ballot by turning in more than 60,000 petition signatures -- four times the requirement -- from every congressional district in New York.
[](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e94/6e822e2f/1b8a7d40/4172495e/2678663365/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjQtYiJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/commit-to-volunteer?source=em180724-b")
_Zephyr with all of our petitions._
We did that because people like you are powering our campaign to root out corruption. Our opponents noticed, and they're going to fight even harder to stop our momentum.
All of our opponents are taking corporate money. They're relying on big money interests to fund their race and fight this battle for them.
We're doing things differently -- we're relying on people like you to help us reach out to voters. But the political and financial establishment will do everything they can to stop us, so we need your help:
**[Will you commit to volunteering with us? We're organizing in every corner of our state, so sign up now and we'll get in touch with details on how to get involved in New York.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e94/6e822e2f/1b8a7d40/4172495e/2678663365/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjQtYiJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/commit-to-volunteer?source=em180724-b")**
What we accomplish in this campaign will be determined by what people like you are willing to do. There is no outside group or big donor that is going to step in and help. We don't need that to win. We just need you.
When historians look back at this moment in our country, there will a question of what we did to stop the lawlessness, corruption and greed poisoning our politics. **This is our chance to stand up and say enough, to say we did everything we could to fight for our democracy.**
**So what do you say?**
**[Add your name right now to commit to volunteering with our campaign. We cannot do this without you.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e94/6e822e2f/1b8a7d40/4172495e/2678663365/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjQtYiJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/commit-to-volunteer?source=em180724-b")**
Thank you so much for helping power our campaign. With your help, we will win.
Now, let's leave it all on the field!
Aly Johnson-Kurts
Field Director
Zephyr for NY
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e94/6e822e2f/1b8a7d40/4172495e/2678663365/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MjQtYiJ9/ "https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/s/commit-to-volunteer?source=em180724-b")**

* * *

clean_body: This is our chance to stand up and say enough, to say we did everything we could to fight for our democracy. Peter - Earlier this month, we secured our spot on the ballot by turning in more than 60,000 petition signatures -- four times the requirement -- from every congressional district in New York. "" Zephyr with all of our petitions. We did that because people like you are powering our campaign to root out corruption. Our opponents noticed, and they're going to fight even harder to stop our momentum. All of our opponents are taking corporate money. They're relying on big money interests to fund their race and fight this battle for them. We're doing things differently -- we're relying on people like you to help us reach out to voters. But the political and financial establishment will do everything they can to stop us, so we need your help: "" What we accomplish in this campaign will be determined by what people like you are willing to do. There is no outside group or big donor that is going to step in and help. We don't need that to win. We just need you. When historians look back at this moment in our country, there will a question of what we did to stop the lawlessness, corruption and greed poisoning our politics. This is our chance to stand up and say enough, to say we did everything we could to fight for our democracy. So what do you say? "" Thank you so much for helping power our campaign. With your help, we will win. Now, let's leave it all on the field! Aly Johnson-Kurts Field Director Zephyr for NY "" * Paid for by Zephyr for NY 1789 Madison Ave, New York, NY 10035

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILY's List
subject: Republicans have made it clear: They will do everything they can to roll back reproductive rights.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4d18/24c69fd9/277660c84/1885eb90/2093835517/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFES58N_digital_email_20180724_StateAttacks_inact&source=WQEFES58N_digital_email_20180724_StateAttacks_inact")
---

Peter,

Republicans have been very clear: They will do everything they can to roll back reproductive rights.

With President Trump's anti-choice Supreme Court nomination and _Roe v. Wade_ hanging in the balance, state Republicans' relentless attacks on choice are an even greater threat.

That's why we've endorsed pro-choice Democratic women up and down the ballot to fight back against anti-choice legislation before it becomes law and makes it to the Supreme Court.

**[Donate $3 to help elect our state and local candidates so they can protect reproductive rights.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4d18/24c69fd9/277660c84/1885eb91/2093835517/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180724_email_StateAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+our+state+and+loc&utm_campaign=WQEFES58N_digital_email_20180724_StateAttacks_inact&source=WQEFES58N_digital_email_20180724_StateAttacks_inact")**

Iowa Gov. Kim Reynolds signed a bill this year that would ban abortion around six weeks of pregnancy, before most women even know they're pregnant.

That's why we've endorsed five women for state legislative seats in Iowa.

The Ohio state Senate passed a bill that would require patients seeking an abortion to undergo counseling and for fetal tissue to be **_buried or cremated._**

That's why we've endorsed 18 women for state legislative seats in Ohio.

And Bill Schuette, a Republican candidate for governor in Michigan, called Trump's Supreme Court nomination a "great decision" and reaffirmed his position as anti-choice, even saying he would enforce pre-_Roe v. Wade_ abortion bans in the state.

That's why we've endorsed Gretchen Whitmer for governor and 12 state legislative candidates in Michigan.

We've made dozens of state and local endorsements across the country to help protect reproductive rights, and we're not stopping anytime soon.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women to state and local office to fight back against Republican attacks on choice:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Fight-Choice-Attacks](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4d18/24c69fd9/277660c84/1885eb92/2093835517/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180724_email_StateAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgFightChoiceAttac&utm_campaign=WQEFES58N_digital_email_20180724_StateAttacks_inact&source=WQEFES58N_digital_email_20180724_StateAttacks_inact")**

Thanks,

Christina Reynolds
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4d18/24c69fd9/277660c84/1885eb93/2093835517/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180724_email_StateAttacks?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFES58N_digital_email_20180724_StateAttacks_inact&source=WQEFES58N_digital_email_20180724_StateAttacks_inact")

Candidates current as of 7/23/18

|
