body:
My team just launched a new ad, and I wanted to make sure you saw. You see, it’s important that strong conservatives like you see the ad now....

Friend,

My team [**just launched a new ad**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLvUTt6tHdKurOGzgeUm-IDU6MhvpxjglekqZ-tb5sDmWBSCOPpav3b3jc0vgQ2H6ncYwUYQRsInPUelLJ8D5rVY9CVbwQZVkFVa2LWMNIyFiUT4uXbu6uIHcdMvM9ppzPbgXusa8caDDc7oPQNzpEMZlCNO1a0dKpLzCRS1N7XMYujYesaICbg8C_YuxyW02SA5GDA0y2hyJKJZ5xSGz_rQqEFON7Xz1ZMOw8K-Aa9iF0gS1C92wQPh9KWrqe_O6NKPRLSg4urPqFMIVSooRWiSK3mTVaTDx_GpeUX6xfMA-it9lo-wX9eyi0RUWQwXfwA5AOsD_1A3BZhuXn_rhG3dpWY4N6PviXRZvkOy8lQN5q3-FpwnACqh5Lr3KN4oefxvobMPcK4NMIRiW5SKKXRk%3D), and I wanted to make sure you saw.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLvUTt6tHdKurOGzgeUm-IDU6MhvpxjglekqZ-tb5sDmWBSCOPpav3b3jc0vgQ2H6ncYwUYQRsInPUelLJ8D5rVY9CVbwQZVkFVa2LWMNIyFiUT4uXbu6uIHcdMvM9ppzPbgXusa8caDDc7oPQNzpEMZlCNO1a0dKpLzCRS1N7XMYfCmL2lmFau1pVrb5bUslONCedBN_6gJ2Kcs_lX_lymmGqZB1FyZdNwGM8LPEL8yZDyhMXWoMUReuQyK69rOYHlD-rMQwiFFKsIo1UX910GTLRq7WLRdWfXSj4OHepi7XSnK7fZC0EN05CewxYNzRG8suIeBuDFfJXkebooshw-CM9UY_2ZKt7MvIZCSTQkcbopuSBFS0osHNxIQn_ALohG0tp-pTYdhunU17TnCmcJs%3D)

You see, it’s important that strong conservatives like you see the ad now, because the DC special interests are doing everything they can to make sure we are silenced. [**I need you – right now – to help me keep this in front of as many people as possible.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLvUTt6tHdKurOGzgeUm-IDU6MhvpxjglekqZ-tb5sDmWBSCOPpav3b3jc0vgQ2H6ncYwUYQRsInPUelLJ8D5rVY9CVbwQZVkFVa2LWMNIyFiUT4uXbu6uIHcdMvM9ppzPbgXusa8caDDc7oPQNzpEMZlCNO1a0dKpLzCRS1N7XMYsw4NXHt-v-rPScNKTOmfWmM_sdniQu1Bu7W9bDA5C8Yzm3w4IsuoOWzzsQIeYnyZIDWxZbjoCzOpzZX5GZZ4cn877H89yJkXrvKvt7eWI96BNMdplFnCCvMBW2Qu_uJQrCl7wOgXKkBujuhnTKAyK5WlJvREeQ8bMxKLWqhmTJpMnVrf5R_dCXkrAq6KUg9kEa8LDlM9RFTwocln6HmOgV6M34RWYXpi_7eN82-PJcI%3D)

In my new ad, I tell a story liberals don’t want you to hear. I focus on how Gov. Walker and I took on the big labor bosses and how I’ll stand with President Trump to cut wasteful spending and build the wall.

Everyone with common sense knows that we can’t spend our way to success, and in order to protect our country, we need to defend our borders – **but the liberals just want to ignore the truth.**

[STOP THE LEFT'S EFFORTS](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLvUTt6tHdKurOGzgeUm-IDU6MhvpxjglekqZ-tb5sDmWBSCOPpav3b3jc0vgQ2H6ncYwUYQRsInPUelLJ8D5rVY9CVbwQZVkFVa2LWMNIyFiUT4uXbu6uIHcdMvM9ppzPbgXusa8caDDc7oPQNzpEMZlCNO1a0dKpLzCRS1N7XMYs3EvXXH5ok0K2UD1giu1iohsZWOLqQyJjUAE5HIgXgqF0aJT_NhKQ7kzuvI76xgArhu7Hhydeyrp6nYhxaNfO4Ub-espuZcOdlzBbSpSfiZAZojBFC0uuXWCg7yiWfypDIyhRWlfv_K0aoE1gU7H1o9jvfZvqHGfuI0UyxSpY15FkqdYAaF6hl8CGq5U5l8C1o1ACl4PTuw7-jXpqqLkWByDjpcXXk8w6JbepSpKmXk%3D)
---

That’s why it’s so important we fight to share my ad with as many Wisconsin voters as possible, friend. Wisconsin needs to hear my plans.

Senator Baldwin will stop at nothing. We need to counter her efforts. We need to stand up for ourselves.

I’m looking to you, friend. [**I hope I can count on you.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLvUTt6tHdKurOGzgeUm-IDU6MhvpxjglekqZ-tb5sDmWBSCOPpav3b3jc0vgQ2H6ncYwUYQRsInPUelLJ8D5rVY9CVbwQZVkFVa2LWMNIyFiUT4uXbu6uIHcdMvM9ppzPbgXusa8caDDc7oPQNzpEMZlCNO1a0dKpLzCRS1N7XMYqpui3XTHzaMLXxTMAapsjoTIXhXT2Q7_lkX2gNw9kOUBQw2s9aVM3iyWDc0JOLaRIHMR0j6vTL-lJTyWOh_ODnDO62cYE4asKBR2P1QOKtynGTmDUSduJ4GN5-AvLiXfMplDFA0BGmOc5rYmVsr2TXregMscy5hddheXqa41DOfBBxifGsNotrAzx53dscHobXVxX_Pf5V_04yU68jyUujU1eby47wDpP0-7lvGH6W8%3D)

Leah

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLghiVlJXT4S_zphhq-sdAhvv7Uqy73y3WncYPFDN6HWMoy3AKRuid_2FgeESvX3w8uOuRov7kElE2E8RlyS4G-8pwze6RLOS9ZOzNYGLJ0zhTQE8CNubChEUCQuUb9OXknB8sWaUIqcs5TrnXp1vzirBUdysfpZFQ37lEPN9TCdqXP4QiavVwKXZzBd3Y5Nephwrx9p0YJTjOCCXKzzCPWQhsHJXXyO2311ABgKj9YajLGyHssMA7Y25C67O5oFLAg%3D%3D) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLr0-CJLVy5BLwMwSFezbbDnB7OTTrVvgeTWIUaeW5lDkuA1-ctsoUXeln_9WXpnBuyUutdLn7YSM6FWjXoAmEIuZRzhnfQaszSmvLdKblDWKr0mKjY20dPlmd3LBAU3JD_FgiJpx2WSIai20D1F5kqiS08tLN2jCd9uXmO21ajcN8BRiVfnD43pHWdNxxS4D6pXb2FIzXp_PSPw7QUCIKyXyCCeahVzGBrQ_2x-v3a-bjRm05eQMX5-lrWVCCg5Wyw%3D%3D)
Paid for by Leah for Senate
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.iterable.com/e/eh?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=k2WEIh4JShILqW8CDQ98FAphr5JJ8YbEuSNULtZv4-1aF5vhr_ou8OoY_Z1ztjU8nTaUQzhXE-O1881nBD0rhi6j4wvb89HJS56jUSTgtca8Ide2ufpinWipMyEFUZ9BZT1BAj_6xeiLpkHpWO70lfbRgPgi4m_AtIHBys7mkZS_oo8pRKA6tfGKC5gK704rsj_3Z5IPnmbyZcbyvgLX0LleGKXXrAdvBYVSpoGTK32-hHM1fJzVaeogl7S-ET8z). Thank you for helping to make Wisconsin a better place for our children and grandchildren. Together, we can continue to make change in our great state. I got into politics because I dared to question the reading practices being used in my daughter’s kindergarten class. For that, they literally sent me to the principal’s office. Can you imagine that? That moment got me started on my mission to expand opportunities for education across Wisconsin, but we have a whole lot further to go. What are the [issues](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLkGfEjgbhkZ2qZcIHsO3kCgzzYLjAiyo18fnmVD2PXiGxzTnhLe6MeIAeuRaDWbon6L4mzz75nvoUT_uPdW25X1UvyY-wj6h7eH9vU-zgv5lE67SZ97omG9PfPIN16Kn6zj4rgfYjQyLgQbCw3MyNrRLiM21Cp_P7vxRuM7lTD9aGBA3zyuvBzid5MvoqRgOpkX2_ZKfxGE_5982mtBCQfCKYgqUQu5xWcGoO9trrOL1z_O6vjfbBbr3PQKivYx46DGcYMycZ0w51crJtzl6NVFaX8VCJyIe4zhhf5iG1LPB-NO6_AFCJzuoZa2jN5l_PLepvfxnJD7tZbqxSyaV3rmm4iGRzpXFMBFuuvr8auPs) that you care about? If the past few years have taught me anything, it’s that if you want to make change, you have to stand up and lead. So I’m asking you, to [stand up](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLkGfEjgbhkZ2qZcIHsO3kCh4FoRZ89ZUR22Eq20wNI761rNQO56tmNxjaeQMA7FM4VDHbDkPpKCNZrVM-WEQfnxb_8vaKK6xqe9ruHxBH5T4VfxmoqdUasWwrBZFHLRKXhFzCbS8U2yzfMlQ-dUTXauSBbbHCXO7B2lypv3u-nBaRbAs7yjOvEi5mUfT55eYXk2Bgr4_sBJU1wHcXI_-7O78kZWV3C7JxTbkyAgbw100O6ZOgBJNX6rv0EnO76X_9aTv8M1qVAMkkCxNCnJBQUkR0NoaDm98R7x-JQwwsjWFSx2SGbDp6f2QWT5Opaj1_OMeZBF6Z8qlIPOHl31GP5McoWNsB8k8yQN-cPd5_J5h) to help me take the Wisconsin way to Washington. Already signed up? Looking to take the next step? Well, the first step is to like my campaign on [Facebook](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLghiVlJXT4S_zphhq-sdAhvv7Uqy73y3WncYPFDN6HWMVvijeL8SJvrkhKhcw5d5MRXuh1fspUzI7pUsRfFX9000QJsmRLq_WQe7LZhvgDTfSL1AyhUlERD3g3Z2sJ1Na0QXt00ah8TfRjWy0FeBVAV74pQm-yqaX99y4DFLUUJXZR0Z8yW1FiG7J1XHxoxQnt1fX4e-n-MqHzBEx_84HdKZA_iy3CyuyV1y9qhujbcME3J42zjEJbIDN-mJoGhorg%3D%3D), follow us on [Twitter](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLr0-CJLVy5BLwMwSFezbbDnB7OTTrVvgeTWIUaeW5lDka2wv0OpHI5SRkL_nqVN32xRhrK2zThkce7eLUiZLWS0MeiJc08WwaiGF2WOfJPjyrg4Ye3Ir-xFx8LkUkI3Gk1jRFMjk6yHTk8xZejbLfCyzLSq5TaSRl1TE6ybOQuhhM4HXho-i0gfXFBfiZu37KEAOpvVVGCIpFJWBXtZNcNLZpI5HpjaYVggp624VXskRMtEOtqOkLh5WTX0BjR8xDQ%3D%3D), and check out my [Instagram](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLnntdGdSle_kTUPB2ro41cucB_gc6H3PsyxbQv1ldWPvh9_Uno5xmGED_tPGQduD2fmoKd1ex30hR7C-CD_wVU0t1zHzl-iFoykiIf9cSW5PWQCMq9yMekq7GD-oTM_mm0ePPL-koBrYxI0rGfKtEabaFReejnFma5FcEKZvcCAbJcXq4PhyaDbGjunqvzE5VrRj4zYHPWAAK5BEXv6_fgcpaFvYS6aHNpzm5CieNcRIhSDlzpWKMP87PfUYtJCrGA%3D%3D) feed. My team and I share lots of great news from the trail there... but considering that you’re still reading, you’re clearly a fighter. A true Wisconsinite. For you, I’d like to invite you to join my [text messaging program](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=d4c4b27e5e084c20a25325b1d76060aa&_e=EK7err9ALPdVKTBnZ-ewLkGfEjgbhkZ2qZcIHsO3kChDsm8wwDYvG_nuPClTxQf8Bjwa7zxOCVWdIi0zV-Q1aCmuNomqkrD32kYylqfOXP0CzM6P299mg07qnGBFT6uuOIjFUYq26bDiSkGo53v5_HpoOySX54gwcoCHxzVUjoZpsOHPzaksFfhKze-YYPWDlsRt8oVDBGuoh14fo6eFuvAA9Ivd2Fv6xCZJihFDfMRzOQ54xRJ4RpnIkPH27r6SUUtPbrCgaJPcDhjozfzu2-wzsQWqICfk7odPO2K2gid4Fn1hd_YLzRfiGJtlyqDVz63WEW5XizvTefY4-Vv7dCJNy7V52UHpun0Qt73523Q-llpHBjAoyWwobjaTfwPbfct67_Xo-zNqOvOmtctAJA%3D%3D) so I can share exclusive information with you via text. name: DNC HQ
subject: You haven't opened one of our emails in awhile, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
If you'd rather stay in touch with the Democratic Party by text, sign up today and we'll send you our most important updates.
---
According to our records, it's been a while since you opened one of our emails. So we'd like to give you the option to stay in touch with the Democratic Party by receiving text messages instead.

**We'll share our most important updates, including breaking news, calls to action, videos, and more -- and we don't send a ton of texts. All you have to do is sign up today:**

[ SIGN UP FOR TEXTS](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521604/4067b0a/60204d0de/7fb4c5f5/1830989912/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/get-texts-instead?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+SIGN+UP+FOR+TEXTS&utm_campaign=em_20180614_dnc_auto&source=em_20180614_dnc_auto")
If email isn't the best way to reach you, we wanted to make sure you still know what Democrats are up to and how you can get involved.

When you sign up to get texts from the Democratic Party, you'll get less frequent messages than you do over email. We'll primarily update you at key moments -- and we might ask you to chip in every once in a while at a critical deadline. But mostly we just want to give you an opportunity to have an active role in our party.

**[Sign up to receive text messages from the Democratic Party and get everything you need to know sent right to your phone.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521604/4067b0a/60204d0de/7fb4c5f2/1830989912/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/get-texts-instead?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Sign+up+to+receive+text+messages+from+th&utm_campaign=em_20180614_dnc_auto&source=em_20180614_dnc_auto")**

Thanks!

The Democrats

P.S. If you want to stay in touch via email, but only get the most important messages, let us know -- **[you can add your name here to join our less email program.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521604/4067b0a/60204d0de/7fb4c5f3/1830989912/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IkRlcmVrIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IldpbGxpcyIsIkpTVmxiV0ZwYkNVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiSlNWNmFYQWxKUT09IjoiMjAxMTIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+you+can+add+your+name+here+to+join+our+l&utm_campaign=em_20180614_dnc_auto&source=em_20180614_dnc_auto")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521604/4067b0a/60204d0de/7fb4c5f0/1830989912/VEsC/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180614_dnc_auto&source=em_20180614_dnc_auto").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521604/4067b0a/60204d0de/7fb4c5f1/1830989912/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180614_dnc_auto").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521604/4067b0a/60204d0de/7fb4c5fe/1830989912/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180614_dnc_auto"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521604/4067b0a/60204d0de/7fb4c5ff/1830989912/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180614_dnc_auto&source=em_20180614_dnc_auto"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Frank Schultz, MenendezForNJ.com
subject: $280 Million
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Menendez for Senate
body:
$280 Million, friend.

That how much Bob Hugin's company, Celgene, agreed to pay last year for misleading cancer patients and defrauding taxpayers.

While $280 million is an unobtainable amount to the rest of us, this is nothing to Hugin. His price gouging on cancer drugs and use of tax loopholes gave him massive wealth. By playing the system, Hugin was able to pad his pockets and those of his friends on Wall Street while working families suffer.

And even after facing this enormous settlement, Bob Hugin is doubling down. He remains committed to repealing the Affordable Care Act and making it even harder for New Jersey families to afford health care.

[**Greedy drug company CEOs like Bob Hugin are the reason too many families can 't afford life-saving medicines, but we want to know what you think. Take our survey about drug companies that gouge patients and families for higher profits.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846caa/3af3c5d/3bae36ec/4ec3978a/431893038/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/take-our-healthcare-survey?gpsid=5_73_2252&source=em18_180724_HCSurv_engg_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180724_HCSurv_engg_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1+-+Greedy+drug+company+CEOs+like+Bob+Hugin+") **[Take the Survey](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846caa/3af3c5d/3bae36ec/4ec3978d/431893038/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/take-our-healthcare-survey?gpsid=5_73_2252&source=em18_180724_HCSurv_engg_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180724_HCSurv_engg_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+Take+the+Survey")** Our state needs a leader who will make sure every single family can afford health care coverage. While Bob Hugin spent his career enriching himself on the backs of cancer patients, Bob Menendez has fought tirelessly to give New Jersey families access to the affordable coverage they need. The choice is clear.

[**Take our survey today and let us know where you stand in the fight against greedy big pharma CEOs like Bob Hugin who put profits before people.**](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/c846caa/3af3c5d/3bae36ec/4ec3978c/431893038/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIxODMyNiIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/take-our-healthcare-survey?gpsid=5_73_2252&source=em18_180724_HCSurv_engg_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180724_HCSurv_engg_gq_cust__FS_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Take+our+survey+today+and+let+us+know+wh")

clean_body: $280 Million, friend. That how much Bob Hugin's company, Celgene, agreed to pay last year for misleading cancer patients and defrauding taxpayers. While $280 million is an unobtainable amount to the rest of us, this is nothing to Hugin. His price gouging on cancer drugs and use of tax loopholes gave him massive wealth. By playing the system, Hugin was able to pad his pockets and those of his friends on Wall Street while working families suffer. And even after facing this enormous settlement, Bob Hugin is doubling down. He remains committed to repealing the Affordable Care Act and making it even harder for New Jersey families to afford health care. "+" "" Our state needs a leader who will make sure every single family can afford health care coverage. While Bob Hugin spent his career enriching himself on the backs of cancer patients, Bob Menendez has fought tirelessly to give New Jersey families access to the affordable coverage they need. The choice is clear. "" Thank you, Frank Frank Schultz Campaign Manager Menendez for Senate "" | Paid for by Menendez for Senate Contributions or gifts to Menendez for Senate are not tax deductible. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: BREAKING: Ohio toss-up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Sherrod Brown
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Here in Ohio, we have a **special election** in just two weeks. Ohio's 12th congressional district is our last chance to flip a seat from red to blue before November. Democrat Danny O'Connor is fighting hard against a lot of outside cash -- and he's made some headway. **_Sabato's Crystal Ball_ just moved this race to a toss-up.** These next two weeks will make all the difference in this key race. [**Danny needs to boost his GOTV efforts -- and fast. Can you help us flip this seat by rushing in a contribution right now?**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff813/4462dc26/6a96793a/20077690/629793203/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI0cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180724pm?refcode=sbe180724pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be evenly split between Danny O'Connor and Sherrod Brown:_ **[Express Donate: $5](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff813/4462dc26/6a96793a/20077697/629793203/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI0cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJtIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180724pm?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=sbe180724pm_m_5&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $10](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff813/4462dc26/6a96793a/20077697/629793203/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI0cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMTAiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180724pm?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=sbe180724pm_m_10&refcode2=3268183")** **[Express Donate: $26](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff813/4462dc26/6a96793a/20077697/629793203/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI0cG0iLCJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiMjYiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180724pm?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=sbe180724pm_m_26&refcode2=3268183")** **[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff813/4462dc26/6a96793a/20077690/629793203/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI0cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180724pm?refcode=sbe180724pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** When I said Danny is fighting "a lot" of outside cash, I'm not joking. The National Republican Congressional Committee already spent almost $600,000 against Danny. The Congressional Leadership Fund **spent $2 million** attacking him. A different candidate may have already thrown in the towel, but not Danny. As the other side outspends him, Danny is all-in with a grassroots effort: he and his team are going door-to-door, talking to people about his platform, and asking them for their support. All his work is paying huge dividends. **Danny's brought this district from deep-red to toss-up.** With our help, maybe Danny can bring it all the way to a win. [**Help Danny and his team by pitching in whatever you can _right now._**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff813/4462dc26/6a96793a/20077690/629793203/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNzI0cG0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180724pm?refcode=sbe180724pm_m_other&refcode2=3268183") Thank you, Sherrod

name: In Case You Missed it - Team Kaine
subject: "Losing him in the Senate would be devastating" - Mark Warner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
| | Derek, we wanted to make sure you didn't miss this important update from Senator Mark Warner.

In his note from earlier today, Mark said that **" mitigating the chaos in Washington is a full-time job, but Tim _also_ has to campaign this year. And he has to do it well - because losing him in the Senate would be devastating." **

He's right. Because Tim has been so busy fighting back against this administration, we're in danger of falling short of our July goal. **We 're $25,000 short of our monthly goal with just one week left to go. [Help us close the gap: Chip in now to make sure we can reach our goal, so Tim can stay focused on fighting back in the Senate >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1239/3e0906/6ebbd7db/3e35d810/548191397/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Help+us+close+the+gap+Chip+in+now+to+mak&utm_campaign=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND&source=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1239/3e0906/6ebbd7db/3e35d817/548191397/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND&source=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND")

Read Mark's full note below.

_Team Kaine_

P.S. - We want to show Mark how much we appreciate his support, so we're hoping to send him a note [tomorrow](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1239/3e0906/6ebbd7db/3e35d86b/548191397/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+tomorrow&utm_campaign=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND&source=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND") that says his message raised $10,000! **Help make sure we get there:[Chip in now >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1239/3e0906/6ebbd7db/3e35d86a/548191397/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+Chip+in+nownbspgtgt&utm_campaign=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND&source=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND")**

\------------FORWARDED MESSAGE------------

FROM: Mark Warner
SUBJECT: Worst-case scenario
Derek, there are no easy days in the Senate - especially lately.

Tim and I are representing Virginia in Washington, and that has meant being vocal on the frontlines of keeping families together and questioning President Trump's Supreme Court nominee to make sure we don't move an inch backwards on our progress.

It's a tough job, but Tim is tougher. He's known to throw hardball questions at confirmation hearings and not yield on the floor when fighting for our values.

**Mitigating the chaos in Washington is a full-time job, but Tim also has to campaign this year. And he has to do it well - because losing him in the Senate would be devastating.**

[Tim hasn't had a lot of time to fundraise this month, and he could fall short of his July goal. Will you chip in to Tim's campaign today to make sure he reaches his goal and can stay focused on fighting back in the Senate?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1239/3e0906/6ebbd7db/3e35d869/548191397/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+Tim+hasnrsquot+had+a+lot+of+time+to+fund&utm_campaign=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND&source=20180724_2_FR_TEAM_Warner-FWD-LDND")

Tim's goals are high because he's building a campaign this year that is focusing on the long-term: using new digital tools and voter mobilization strategies that will help House candidates this year AND state legislature candidates next year.

At the end of the day, Tim is going to prioritize fighting for Virginia and for what is right - _but missing this July goal would be a worst-case scenario._

clean_body: | | Derek, we wanted to make sure you didn't miss this important update from Senator Mark Warner. In his note from earlier today, Mark said that " mitigating the chaos in Washington is a full-time job, but Tim also has to campaign this year. And he has to do it well - because losing him in the Senate would be devastating." He's right. Because Tim has been so busy fighting back against this administration, we're in danger of falling short of our July goal. We 're $25,000 short of our monthly goal with just one week left to go. "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" Read Mark's full note below. Team Kaine P.S. - We want to show Mark how much we appreciate his support, so we're hoping to send him a note "" that says his message raised $10,000! Help make sure we get there: "" \------------FORWARDED MESSAGE------------ FROM: Mark Warner SUBJECT: Worst-case scenario Derek, there are no easy days in the Senate - especially lately. Tim and I are representing Virginia in Washington, and that has meant being vocal on the frontlines of keeping families together and questioning President Trump's Supreme Court nominee to make sure we don't move an inch backwards on our progress. It's a tough job, but Tim is tougher. He's known to throw hardball questions at confirmation hearings and not yield on the floor when fighting for our values. Mitigating the chaos in Washington is a full-time job, but Tim also has to campaign this year. And he has to do it well - because losing him in the Senate would be devastating. "" Tim's goals are high because he's building a campaign this year that is focusing on the long-term: using new digital tools and voter mobilization strategies that will help House candidates this year AND state legislature candidates next year. At the end of the day, Tim is going to prioritize fighting for Virginia and for what is right - but missing this July goal would be a worst-case scenario. If everyone reading this chips in, we can help Tim fill the $27,500 gap so that he can reach his goal and continue to build a game-changing program for Virginia Democrats: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for investing in Tim, good things to come in Virginia for 2018 and beyond. Mark Warner "" "" * | "" "" ""

name: The Sanders Institute
subject: Climate Crisis and The Private Sector
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
Our future, our children's future, and our planet's future all depend on us taking action against climate change.
#
Friend,
Our future, our children's future, and our planet's future all depend on us taking action against climate change. Scientists have been warning us for years about the dangers of a warming planet and have been telling us what steps we need to be taking to curb global warming.
One of the major issues that we are faced with today is not what to do, but how to change the policies that are holding us back.
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa3c/bed43eb/6058596b/75fd5cb3/174724468/VEsH/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-private-sector-and-climate-change-holding-corporations-accountable")
**[In this video, Bill McKibben addresses some of the ways that we can hold corporations accountable and stop actions that negatively affect the environment: we must get money out of politics, encourage taxes that reflect the true cost of pollution, and put an end to subsidies for companies that harm the environment.](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa3c/bed43eb/6058596b/75fd5cb3/174724468/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-private-sector-and-climate-change-holding-corporations-accountable")**
Our future depends on it.
Thanks for staying engaged,
The Sanders Institute
**[DONATE»](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa3c/bed43eb/6058596b/75fd5cb2/174724468/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=em180724")**
PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
131 CHURCH STREET
BURLINGTON, VT 05401

The Sanders Institute is a tax-exempt 501(c)(3) organization.
131 Church Street, Burlington, VT 05401
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7aa3c/bed43eb/6058596b/75fd5cbd/174724468/VEsC/ "https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")

name: Team Scholten
subject: 📣 HUGE NEWS IN IA04!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
Apologies for the "all caps" but...
**HUGE NEWS IN IA04!**
New political race rankings were released today from Larry Sabato’s Crystal Ball, a national center that ranks political races across the country.
**For the first time in years, Steve King’s seat is no longer considered “Safe Republican!”**
****
J.D. and this movement, which in April had the Cook Report call Steve King “at risk,” has once again moved the needle in this race! **Make no mistake, this is a fight that can be won.** Although Steve King has been in office for 16 years, it’s clear which way the winds are blowing in NW Iowa.
While this is great news for the prospects of this race, we can’t let up even for a minute. name: Jacky
subject: McConnell's best shot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Team,
Mitch McConnell told _The Washington Post_ the battle for Senate control hinges on Nevada - and right now he's got his best shot yet to keep this seat.
Our opponent just had his best fundraising quarter ever. A recent poll has us down one. And McConnell is absolutely desperate to expand the GOP's Senate majority.
**That 's why a McConnell-linked super PAC is spending $11.2 million on ads attacking us - and a McConnell-linked dark money group just announced another $4.6 million buy for August. The hard truth is that if the election were held today, _we could lose_. **[(Step up with $5 or more right now to win in Nevada and take back the Senate from McConnell!)](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd1f8/4fbb2af3/7a8f83cd/5e8b7645/3478472379/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgxOS1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk819-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates. Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please "". Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please "". If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please "". We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax-deductible.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: We must win back the states
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
State elections are key to reshaping the nation's balance of power.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78baf/2f5ea88d/775382e5/2cbc071b/1136950902/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-back-the-states?utm_source=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&refcode=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&utm_campaign=dem_governors&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I've said it before and I'll say it again: While Trump and his administration cause chaos in D.C., states must step up to lead the nation in furthering our progressive values. The good news is that Democrats in the states are on the brink of major gains in 2018. Last week, I met with governors from across America, from both parties. And you know what? We all agreed that the progressive movement is posed to win big in 2018, while Republicans brace for the backlash against Trump that could cause them to lose governorships in moderate states. And the _New York Times_ took notice in a big way. [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78baf/2f5ea88d/775382e5/2cbc071b/1136950902/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-back-the-states?utm_source=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&refcode=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&utm_campaign=dem_governors&utm_medium=ema") [**Democrats are ready to win state by state, vote by vote -- and I need your help to power the movement. Can you chip in right now to help?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78baf/2f5ea88d/775382e5/2cbc071b/1136950902/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-back-the-states?utm_source=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&refcode=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&utm_campaign=dem_governors&utm_medium=ema") | [CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78baf/2f5ea88d/775382e5/2cbc071b/1136950902/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-back-the-states?utm_source=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&refcode=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&utm_campaign=dem_governors&utm_medium=ema")
---
The truth is that Trump's positions on issues like health care, taxes, and clean energy are hurting folks in states across the country. As I told the _New York Times_ , across the country, "you cannot overstate the anger, the concern, and the desire to vote against the GOP."
**We must channel that energy into taking back the states.** State elections are key to reshaping the nation's balance of power, and Democratic governors are the last stop for protecting our progressive values.
Whether we're talking about reproductive freedoms or gerrymandering, the Supreme Court is no longer a reliable protector of our rights. Access to reproductive healthcare options will be determined by **state** laws. Congressional districts will be redrawn after the 2020 census by **state** legislatures.
**That's why our best long-term plan to reclaim power from the right is to win in the states in 2018. This election will have decadal significance.**
We have historic opportunities to win elections in places no one thought would be competitive months ago. We have a chance to redraw unfair legislative boundaries to fix Republican gerrymandering. We've made great progress here in Washington state -- and achieved the #1 state economy -- by growing clean energy jobs and passing legislation on voting rights and gun control. We know this model can work across the country.
This is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to rebuild the Democratic Party and stop Trump in the states. [**It's more important than ever that we keep up the fight -- can you contribute to the resistance right now?**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78baf/2f5ea88d/775382e5/2cbc071b/1136950902/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-back-the-states?utm_source=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&refcode=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&utm_campaign=dem_governors&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Governor Jay Inslee
[CONTRIBUTE »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78baf/2f5ea88d/775382e5/2cbc071b/1136950902/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/take-back-the-states?utm_source=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&refcode=ema_2018-07-24_dem_governors&utm_campaign=dem_governors&utm_medium=ema")
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78baf/2f5ea88d/775382e5/2cbc071a/1136950902/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Contributions or gifts to Jay Inslee for Washington are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
